heading: Failure of selection for promotion
label: 15106 Failure of selection for promotion
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (d)(1), probably should be , which relates to officers twice failed of selection. relates to officers considered but not selected due to material error.Section 14502(b) of this titlesection 14501(b) of this titleSection 14502(b) of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in this section, sections 14501 through 14513 of this title shall apply to promotions of officers in competitive categories of officers designated for purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Inapplicability of Failure of Selection for Promotion to Officers Above Promotion Zone
children.label: b .—Inapplicability of Failure of Selection for Promotion to Officers Above Promotion Zone
children.text: The reference in to an officer above the promotion zone shall not apply in the promotion of officers described in subsection (a).section 14501 of this title

children.heading: .—Special Selection Board Matters
children.label: c .—Special Selection Board Matters
children.text: The reference in to a person above the promotion zone shall not apply in the promotion of officers described in subsection (a).section 14502(a)(1) of this title

an officer described in subsection (a) shall not be deemed to have failed twice of selection for promotion for purposes of section 14502(b) of this title until the officer has failed selection of promotion to the next higher grade the maximum number of times specified for opportunities for promotion to such grade within the competitive category concerned pursuant to ; and1section 15104 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

any reference in sections 14504 through 14506 of this title to an officer who has failed of selection for promotion to the next higher grade for the second time shall be deemed to refer instead to an officer described in subsection (a) who has failed of selection for promotion to the next higher grade for the maximum number of times specified for opportunities for promotion to such grade within the competitive category concerned pursuant to such section 15104.
